tasks.title: Implement ticket assignment PATCH endpoint
tasks.description: Add logic to `PATCH /api/tickets/:id/assignee` that validates payload, updates the ticket in MemoryTicketStore, and returns the updated ticket or proper error codes.
tasks.design_notes: Inject the TicketStore via a service layer so the endpoint can work with either Memory or SQLite implementations without code changes.

tasks.title: Add assignee UI controls to ticket detail view
tasks.description: Create a dropdown or selector in the React ticket detail component that calls the shared API client to assign a ticket and updates the UI on success.
tasks.design_notes: Leverage the existing API client typings in `shared/api.ts` and handle loading/error states within the component.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for assignment flow
tasks.description: Add Vitest/Supertest tests covering the PATCH endpoint, validation errors, and successful assignment updates in both MemoryTicketStore and future SQLite store.
tasks.design_notes: Structure tests to use the server's exported app instance and mock the TicketStore when needed for isolation.

tasks.title: Implement SQLiteTicketStore with migrations
tasks.description: Create a functional SQLite-backed TicketStore using `better-sqlite3`, add migration scripts to create tickets table and seed initial data.
tasks.design_notes: Follow the existing TicketStore interface; use a singleton DB connection and parameterized statements to prevent SQL injection.

tasks.title: Configure server to select ticket store via env flag
tasks.description: Modify server startup to read an environment variable (e.g., `USE_SQLITE`) and wire either MemoryTicketStore or SQLiteTicketStore accordingly.
tasks.design_notes: Encapsulate store selection in a factory function to keep `app.ts` clean and testable.

tasks.title: Add admin auth middleware and audit log endpoint
tasks.description: Implement real admin check in auth middleware, create `GET /api/audit-log` that returns logged actions, and ensure only admin users can access it.
tasks.design_notes: Use JWT claims or a simple role header for admin identification; log actions in the SQLite DB via a new `audit_logs` table.

tasks.title: Create saved views API and UI panel
tasks.description: Add endpoints to save and retrieve user-specific queue view settings, store them in SQLite, and build a React panel allowing users to manage their saved views.
tasks.design_notes: Define a `SavedView` contract in `shared/contracts.ts` and use the existing API client pattern for frontend communication.

commits.summary: Add .env example, CI workflow, .gitignore, and README to scaffold the project
